title: Shape impl declaration
description: Formal schema for a shape impl provision per D13 (shape kind) — the carrier of substantive identity (D4); a policy bundle of authority-bindings + roles + hooks + actor-requirements + capability requirements. Notation: JSON Schema Draft 2020-12 per D28. Layer-3 formal schema per D11. Cross-kind referential integrity (e.g., capability identifiers resolve) is out of scope per D28. The `extends` slot was removed per D31.

id.description: Stable shape identifier (D13). Vocabulary-identifier per D34.

actor-requirements.description: Workspace-level cardinality constraints per actor-subtype not expressible in authority-bindings (D13). Required slot; explicit 'none' admissible (per D13 required-with-explicit-empty / explicit-none pattern).

oneOf.description: Map from actor-subtype identifier (e.g., 'human-actor', or extension-registered subtype) to {min, max?}. max=null means unbounded.

required-capabilities.description: Substrate capabilities the shape needs (D13). Non-empty: a shape that needs no capabilities cannot meaningfully impose policy.

optional-capabilities.description: Substrate capabilities the shape uses if present (D13). Required slot; may be [].

authority-bindings.description: Per-event authority requirements as (payload-subtype, qualifier?, required-role, required-actor-subtype, additional-constraints?) tuples (D13). Required slot; may be [].

roles.description: Role-tag vocabulary the shape introduces (D13). Required slot; may be [].

hooks.description: Semantic declarations of policy hook points (D13). Formal hook interface = layer 3 / forthcoming. Required slot; may be [].
